# CWE-917 negative: fixed template with parameterized data (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-917-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-917 mitigated: template structure is fixed; user values are data fields only.

import (
	"bytes"
	"net/http"
	"text/template"
)

const reportTemplatePure = `{{.Title}} filtered by {{.Filter}}`

func RenderReportSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		title := r.URL.Query().Get("title")
		filter := r.URL.Query().Get("filter")
		tmpl := template.Must(template.New("report").Parse(reportTemplatePure))
		var buf bytes.Buffer
		data := map[string]string{"Title": title, "Filter": filter}
		if err := tmpl.Execute(&buf, data); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
		w.Write(buf.Bytes())
	}
}
